victim.value: Katie, a little girl who is dead, dressed in lavender with red stains
victim.quote: This was the little girl my whole investigation was on. She was dressed in a lavender dress with red stains

closed_world.value: A mill where the investigation takes place
closed_world.quote: All was quite in the mill. The gear softly turning

investigator.value: First-person narrator conducting an investigation about Katie
investigator.quote: This was the little girl my whole investigation was on

red_herring.value: Supernatural elements (ghosts, glowing figures) may be misdirecting from human agency in Katie's death
red_herring.quote: The shine was a tall teen that was around the age of fifteen maybe. The glow though was Katie.

clue_fairness.value: Visual clues about Katie's appearance and death are presented directly to reader through narrator's observations
clue_fairness.quote: She was dressed in a lavender dress with red stains on it and her hair was up in two braids.

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural manifestations appear to be the method of revealing truth about Katie's case
reveal_mechanic.quote: This was the little girl my whole investigation was on.

investigator_wound.value: Investigator appears emotionally affected by the case involving a dead child, showing vulnerability to the supernatural elements
investigator_wound.quote: To me she would have been the description of cute if there was not the part about her being dead.

_meta.title: ebook c kelemen the lively glow of death
